If you need same-day garage door repair in Pleasanton, here are several local providers that advertise same-day or emergency service:

  * Valiant Garage Door — Same-day repair for broken springs, openers, cables, and emergency issues when scheduling and parts availability allow. Phone: (925) 409-4974. [Valiant Garage Door | Same-Day Repair, Springs & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Door King — Garage door repair, installation, and maintenance with emergency service availability. Phone: (925) 387-4404. [Door King | Expert Garage Door Services in Pleasanton, CA](https://www.rollupdoorssales.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Precision Garage Door Service — Offers same-day repairs seven days a week for springs, openers, cables, and other garage door issues. Phone: (925) 268-9267. [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA | Precision Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Silver Door Garage Door Specialists — Serves Pleasanton with 24/7 emergency and same-day appointments. Phone: (925) 578-2873. [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA | Silver Door Garage Door Specialists](https://silverdoorgaragedoordublin.com/service-areas/pleasanton?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Floyd Garage Door Service — Repair, installation, and maintenance services with extended daily hours. Phone: (925) 633-5789. [Floyd Garage Door Repair - Floyd Garage Door Service](https://challenderelectric.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

For a door that is stuck open, has a broken spring, or won't close securely, I'd start with either Valiant Garage Door or Precision Garage Door Service because both specifically advertise same-day repair in Pleasanton. [Valiant Garage Door | Same-Day Repair, Springs & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA | Precision Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

What problem are you having—broken spring, opener issue, off-track door, or something else? I can help you estimate urgency and typical repair cost.
